data.name: Louie

abilities.name: Spring the Trap
abilities.text: While this character is being challenged, the challenging character gets -1 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
"The snakes are cool, I guess. Pretty standard
trap, though."

data.name: Dewey
data.flavor_text:
"Snakes? Firing lasers? In a secret underground
lair? No problem!"

data.name: Huey

abilities.name: I Know the Way
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Forget the magical snakes. There's the way out
of the trap!"

data.name: Goofy

abilities.name: Plenty to Go Around
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, you may remove up to 1 damage from each of your other characters. Ready each character you removed damage from this way.

data.flavor_text: "You're just in time for Surprise à la Goof!"

abilities.name: Of Course They Can Come
abilities.text: Once during your turn, whenever one of your characters sings a song, you may search your deck for a character card with cost 3 or less and reveal that card to all players. Put that card into your hand and shuffle your deck.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: True Valor
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} for each 1 damage on her.

abilities.name: Superior Mind
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a non-character card of your choice.

abilities.name: Lasting Legacy
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Charlotte La Bouff
data.flavor_text:
"Seems like only yesterday we were both little
girls dreaming our fairy tale dreams, and tonight
they're finally coming true."

keywords.name: Singer 6
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 6 to sing songs.)

abilities.name: Captivating Melody
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, each opposing character gets -1 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.name: Mirabel Madrigal

abilities.name: You Are a Wonder
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may reveal a song card in your hand to gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"Whatever gift awaits will be just as special as you."
—Alma Madrigal

data.name: Lady

abilities.name: Someone to Care For
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.

data.flavor_text: She's happiest in the company of those she loves.

data.name: Jim Dear

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text: Family is family no matter what.

data.name: Gene

abilities.name: I Guess You Earned This
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"Getting a medal feels pretty great. Making Gene
squirm feels even better."
—Wreck-It Ralph

data.name: Perdita

abilities.name: Keeping Watch
abilities.text: While you have a Puppy character in play, this character gets +1 {Willpower}.

data.flavor_text:
"Where did the forest go? Stay close, my darlings.
Something's amiss here."
—Perdita

data.name: Rhino

abilities.name: Tiny Howl
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -1 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

data.flavor_text: "I eat danger for breakfast."

data.name: Darling Dear

abilities.name: How Sweet
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gets +2 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"I don't imagine anything could ever take her
place in our hearts."

data.name: The Colonel

abilities.name: We've Got 'em Outnumbered
abilities.text: While you have 3 or more Puppy characters in play, this character gets +2 {Strength} and +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
His training was invaluable in infiltrating the
palace.

abilities.name: Sending Backup
abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, whenever one of your characters with Bodyguard is banished, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a character card with cost 5 or less, you may play that character for free. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.

abilities.name: Look Me in the Eye
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {Strength} and gains Reckless until the start of your next turn. (They can't quest and must challenge if able.)

data.flavor_text: "You have just made a s-serious mis-sstake, my friend."

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Tramp.)

abilities.text: During an opponent's turn, whenever one of your characters is banished, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text: Sand sure was more fun than it looked!

data.flavor_text:
"The only power you need is the power of AWESOMENESS!"
—Rhino

—Antonio

data.flavor_text: "I'm sorry I held on too tight."

abilities.name: I've Got Just the Thing
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may remove up to 1 damage from each of your characters with Bodyguard.

data.flavor_text: "If you need fixin', ol' Joey's on the job."

abilities.name: Here, Piggy, Piggy
abilities.text: For each item named The Nephews' Piggy Bank you have in play, you pay 2 {Ink} less to play this character.

abilities.name: Money Everywhere
abilities.text: When you play this character, your other characters gain "{Exert} — Draw a card" this turn.

data.name: Dalmatian Puppy

abilities.name: Where Did They All Come From?
abilities.text: You may have up to 99 copies of Dalmatian Puppy - Tail Wagger in your deck.

data.flavor_text: "Oh boy! A new friend to play with!"

data.name: Candy Drift
rules: Draw a card. Chosen character of yours gets +5 {Strength} this turn. At the end of your turn, banish them.
data.flavor_text:
"This will overheat your engine like a sack of cinnamon
candy, so you better win quick!"
—Vanellope von Schweetz

data.name: She's Your Person
rules:
Choose one:
• Remove up to 3 damage from chosen character.
• Remove up to 3 damage from each of your characters
with Bodyguard.

data.name: Only So Much Room
rules: Return chosen character with 2 {Strength} or less to their player's hand. Return a character card from your discard to your hand.
data.flavor_text:
"Home wreckers! That's what they are!"
—Tramp

rules: Return up to 3 character cards from your discard to your hand. You pay 2 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

Chosen character gets -4 {Strength} until the start of your next turn.

of weakness to attack."
—Sisu

abilities.name: Short on Patience

data.flavor_text:
"I'm not in the vision business right now. I'm in the
stopping you business."

abilities.name: Llama Breath

data.flavor_text: "Wait'll they get a whiff of this..."

abilities.name: Contentious Alliance
abilities.text: While you have a character named Hades in play, this character gains Challenger +2. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.flavor_text:
"The sooner we get this done, the sooner I'm free...
of you."

abilities.name: We Only Trust Nature
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.name: Ryder

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
"Sheesh, what is it with this high sultan guy?
Can't he put in stairs like a normal person?"

data.name: Bambi
data.flavor_text:
As he grew older, he began to understand his
responsibilities to all the creatures of the woods.

data.name: Poe De Spell
data.flavor_text:
"Sister, dear, if we turn all the townspeople into
frogs, who will give us our gold and turnips?"

data.name: Madam Mim
data.flavor_text:
"They think they know my tricks...Oh, this one's
going to be marvelously malicious!"

data.flavor_text:
"I have to protect my sister. You're not going
anywhere!"

data.flavor_text:
"My primo Camilo won't stop until he makes you
smile today."
—Mirabel

data.name: Flower

abilities.name: Looking For Friends
abilities.text: Whenever you play another character, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text:
His sweet nature outmatches all the blooms in the
meadow.

data.name: Forest Duel
rules: Your characters gain Challenger +2 and "When this character is banished in a challenge, return this card to your hand" this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)
data.flavor_text: Fight with honor, win with dignity.

data.name: They Never Come Back
rules: Up to 2 chosen characters can't ready at the start of their next turn. Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"You boys have had your fun. Now, pay for it."
—The Coachman

rules: For each character that sang this song, draw a card and gain 1 lore.

rules:
Choose one:
• Draw 2 cards.
• Each opponent chooses and discards a card.

Put chosen exerted character into their player's inkwell facedown and exerted.

rules: Move 1 damage counter from each damaged character you have in play to chosen opposing character. Draw a card for each damage counter moved this way.

abilities.text: {Exert} — Return an Illusion character card from your discard to your hand.

"If we can catch one, maybe we can recalibrate it to
help us get rid of Jafar's illusions!"
—Venturo, an Illumineer

data.name: Wilhelmina Packard
data.flavor_text:
Helga: "Sounds metallic. Could be an echo off one
of the rocks."
Wilhelmina: "Do you want to do my job? Be my guest."

data.flavor_text:
One glance at the tiny tracks, and his protective instincts
kicked in.

—White Rabbit

real face and body."

abilities.name: Are You Sure This Is Safe, Captain?

data.flavor_text: He certainly isn't the brains of the operation.

data.name: Dale
data.flavor_text:
"You're the fearless copilot who can handle any
job....Did I say fearless? I meant brainless!"
—Chip

abilities.name: Sensitive Soul

data.flavor_text:
"Everyone knows that without rations, an
operation'll be a failure. And this is why I outrank
you, Lafayette. 'Cause I see the big picture."

data.flavor_text: "Don't worry, Dale! I've got you!"

around I'd find it!"

data.flavor_text:
"Settle in, ye wee pups, and let Uncle Jock tell ye a story
about some Illumineers and a mad adventure..."

abilities.name: You Don't Need That

data.flavor_text: Lives to steal another day!

rules: Return up to 2 chosen characters with 3 {Strength} or less each to their player's hand.

Choose one:

data.name: Undermine
rules: Chosen opponent chooses and discards a card. Chosen character gets +2 {Strength} this turn.
data.flavor_text: "It's a real shame I didn't even get a chance to study it."

rules: Your Pirate characters gain "{Exert} — Banish chosen damaged character" this turn.
data.flavor_text:
It was at this point that John decided he'd had quite
enough adventure.

abilities.name: Here's the Best Part

data.flavor_text:
"Cute, but also potentially devastating. Perfect."
—Honey Lemon

data.name: Jeweled Collar

abilities.name: Welcome Extravagance
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters is challenged, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
Archazia created many wondrous things, but none as
beautiful as this.

data.name: Gloyd Orangeboar

abilities.name: Pumpkin Spice
abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"I've got tricks for my opponents and treats for
my fans!"

data.name: Honest John
data.flavor_text:
"Say, jewels just lying around in a fancy joint like
this? It would be a shame if a few went missing..."

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: I'll Show You!
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -3 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: Vanellope von Schweetz

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

data.flavor_text:
"I can handle anything you throw at me...Wait, are
those laser snakes? This is the best track ever!"

data.name: Brutus

abilities.name: Spiteful
abilities.text: During your turn, when this character is banished, if one of your characters was damaged this turn, gain 2 lore.

data.flavor_text: He's identical to Nero in cruelty and classiness.

data.name: The Dodo

abilities.name: Extraordinary Situation
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} for each 1 damage on him.

data.flavor_text:
"And there I was in the cave below the palace
when suddenly sand began pouring down. Did I
stop? No! What's a little sand?"

data.name: Alice

abilities.name: This Way Out
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may ready chosen damaged character of yours. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Goodness, those scarabs are awfully close!
We must find the way out!"

data.name: Lumiere

abilities.name: Quick-step
abilities.text: While you have an item card in your discard, this character gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

data.flavor_text:
"Sacrebleu! This is no way to treat a guest in your
palace!"

data.name: Gaston

abilities.name: Break Apart
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may banish one of your items to give chosen character +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Take this magical stone. You'll need it to keep up
with me!"

data.name: Mushu

abilities.name: Let's Get This Show on the Road
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

data.flavor_text:
"Move, move, move! There's no time to explain.
Well, maybe a little time, so listen up..."

data.name: Cri-Kee

abilities.name: At Her Side
abilities.text: While you have 2 or more other exerted characters in play, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"You were so focused on me and Mulan that you forgot
about my man Cri-Kee here. And that was a mistake!"
—Mushu

data.name: Lafayette
data.flavor_text:
"What are we guarding the kitchen for, Napoleon?
There ain't no scarabs 'round here. Call me when
there's somethin' serious that needs fixin'."

data.name: Figaro

abilities.name: Playfulness
abilities.text: Opposing items enter play exerted.

data.flavor_text:
"Say hello to Figaro. Up to mischief already!"
—Geppetto

data.name: Thumper

abilities.name: You Can Do It!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets +3 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"C'mon! Let's show that mean old high sultan
what's what."

data.name: Wreck-It Ralph

abilities.name: Charged Up
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen Racer character gets +4 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"Let's burn rubber, kid!"
—Wreck-It Ralph

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.text: Whenever you play a character with 5 {Strength} or more, you may exert them to gain 2 lore.

data.name: LeFou

abilities.name: All For Me
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
"LeFou, sometimes you really take the cake."
—Gaston

data.name: Mr. Snoops

abilities.name: Double-crossing Crook!
abilities.text: During your turn, when this character is banished, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"You can't do this to me, you swindler! We had a
verbal agreement!"

data.name: Friend Owl
data.flavor_text:
"Sand? In the forest? I'll bet some magical
miscreant's up to no good. Well, it's none of my
concern. I'm going back to bed."

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: Precocious Friend
abilities.text: While you have a character in play with more {Strength} than each opposing character, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

data.name: Prince John

abilities.name: Help! Help!
abilities.text: Whenever an opponent plays a character, deal 1 damage to this character.

data.flavor_text: Even a frightened lion still has claws.

data.name: Nothing We Won't Do

keywords.name: Sing Together 8
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 8 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Ready all your characters. For the rest of this turn, they take no damage from challenges and can't quest.

data.name: Get Out!
rules: Banish chosen character, then return an item card from your discard to your hand.
data.flavor_text:
"Leave now. Before I change my mind."
—The Beast

data.name: Light the Fuse
rules: Deal 1 damage to chosen character for each exerted character you have in play.
data.flavor_text: A bold act can change the course of battle.

data.name: Twitterpated
rules: Chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
data.flavor_text:
A mysterious phenomenon that makes you feel both
invincible and vulnerable at the same time.

data.name: Most Everyone's Mad Here
rules: Gain lore equal to the damage on chosen character, then banish them.
data.flavor_text:
"Well, some go this way, some go that way. But as for
me, myself, personally, I prefer the shortcut."

data.name: The Sword of Shan-Yu

abilities.name: Worthy Weapon
abilities.text: {Exert} — Ready chosen character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"I know what this means to you."
—The Emperor

data.name: The Mouse Queen
data.flavor_text:
"After that dreadful Ratigan business, I know
about villains. This Jafar is certainly a villain of the
highest order."

data.name: Sir Pellinore

abilities.name: Code of Honor
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, your other characters gain Support this turn. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: "Together, lads, we prevail!"

abilities.name: I'll Take Care of You
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may give chosen Puppy character Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Olaf

abilities.name: Endless Tale
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"It began with two sisters. One born with magical
powers, and one born powerless. Their love of
snowmen, infinite."

abilities.name: We Can Do This Together
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have a character named Elsa in play, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Wasabi

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"Okay, so the plan is ‘leave Wasabi to watch our
backs while we steal the crown.’ Good to know."

data.name: Go Go Tomago

abilities.name: Need This!
abilities.text: When you play a Floodborn character on this card, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: "Check it out! This ‘ink’ offers so many possibilities."

data.name: The Wardrobe

abilities.name: I Have Just the Thing!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw 2 cards.

data.flavor_text: "Time to try something new, dear."

data.name: Mrs. Potts

abilities.name: Clean Up
abilities.text: {Exert} — Draw a card.

data.flavor_text:
"Now, don't fret over the mess, love. We'll have
everything shipshape in no time."

abilities.name: Just What You Need
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may give another chosen character Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Little Sister

abilities.name: Let Me Help
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may remove up to 1 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
As Skippy's older sister, she's had lots of
experience putting things back together.

data.name: Adelaide Bonfamille
data.flavor_text:
"Beautiful music can ennoble one's spirit, no
matter how dire things seem."

abilities.name: Stick to the Plan
abilities.text: {Exert} — Another chosen character gains Resist +2 this turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

abilities.name: It's Up to You, Lilo
abilities.text: Your characters named Lilo gain Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: So Naughty
abilities.text: When you play this character, each opponent puts the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

abilities.text: At the start of your turn, if this card is in your discard, you may choose and discard a card with ◉ to play this character for free and he enters play exerted.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: Time Runs Out
abilities.text: At the end of your turn, if you didn't put any cards into your inkwell this turn, banish this character.

data.name: Arthur

abilities.name: No More Books
abilities.text: Skip your turn's Draw step.

data.flavor_text:
"Do you want to be all muscle and no brain?"
—Merlin

data.name: Bernard

abilities.name: Go Down There and Investigate
abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have an Ally character in play, you may draw a card.

data.flavor_text: "Miss Bianca, over here! I found something!"

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Safe Passage
abilities.text: Whenever one of your Ally characters quests, you may remove up to 2 damage from this character.

keywords.name: Shift 2
keywords.text: (You may pay 2 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Jasmine.)

abilities.name: Always Planning
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal an Ally character card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Roquefort

abilities.name: Safekeeping
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may put chosen item into its player's inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
"Jafar will never expect us to hide lore from him in
his own safe! How exciting!"

data.name: Jumba Jookiba
data.flavor_text:
"This little thing has a much more rudimentary
design than if I had created it. But if you were
rushing development, then this makes sense."

data.name: Geppetto

abilities.name: Seeking Inspiration
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may choose and discard any number of item cards to gain 1 lore for each item card discarded this way.

data.flavor_text: Everything he carves is a work of art.

data.name: Heads Held High

keywords.name: Sing Together 6
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 6 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Remove up to 3 damage from any number of chosen characters. All opposing characters get -3 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: Pouncing Practice
rules: Chosen character gets -2 {Strength} this turn. Chosen character of yours gains Evasive this turn. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
data.flavor_text:
"Check out this cool trick my dad taught me!"
—Simba

data.name: Down in New Orleans
rules: (A character with cost 6 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a character, item, or location card with cost 6 or less and play it for free. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Television Set

abilities.name: Is It on Yet?
abilities.text: {Exert} — Look at the top card of your deck. If it's a Puppy character card, you may reveal it and put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

data.flavor_text: Thunderbolt's show was one thing all the puppies could agree on.

data.name: Belle's Favorite Book

abilities.name: Chapter Three
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text: Some stories stay with you forever.

abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Resist +2 and Support until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2. Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.name: Atitaya
data.flavor_text:
"Spears of Fang, stand strong and tall. We are the
last line of defense and we will not fall!"

data.name: Bobby

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.flavor_text: "You come at me, you get the beak, capisce?"

data.flavor_text:
"Talk about overdressed and self-absorbed!"
—Jasmine

data.flavor_text: "Say, let me do it, Mad Dog. It's my turn."

data.flavor_text: "How dare you? Arm yourself, scoundrel!"

data.name: General Li

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text:
"A single grain of rice can tip the scale. One man may
be the difference between victory and defeat."
—The Emperor

data.flavor_text: "This place is scarier than Prince John."

data.flavor_text:
"In dark times, a crown is a weighty honor we
must bear with grace and courage."

"When the whole world changes around you,
remember that Khan will always be the same—
steadfast and true."
—Fa Zhou

data.flavor_text: "That's quite a predicament you're in. Glad it ain't me."

data.flavor_text: "Nice try, chumps! Too bad I'm all the way up here!"

data.flavor_text:
"Flint's secret trove was never found, but stories have
persisted that it remains hidden..."
—Narrator

"Ah! Finally, a good use for his destructive instincts."
—Jumba Jookiba

"It's my decision. My choice. And you won't stop me."
—Namaari
